_comment: Facilitator profiles for Otterotter. 'photo' is a path under assets/facilitators/. 'pronouns' shows in small letters after the name (e.g. "she/her", "they/them", "he/him"); leave "" to hide. 'modalities' are the 'Meet me at' tags. 'event_links' links a facilitator to events: paste the exact event website link(s) (the same URL shown on the event) into the array, and the site cross-links the facilitator and those events both ways. Example: "event_links": ["https://contactfestival.de/"].

facilitators.name: Dorte Bjerre Jensen
facilitators.bio_short: Dancer, performer, researcher, facilitator and therapist with a background in football and taekwondo. Her contact improvisation practice is rooted in bodily awareness and deep listening — to others and to oneself.

facilitators.name: Sebastian Grubb
facilitators.bio_short: Award-winning movement coach and dance artist based between Copenhagen and California. Founder of Agile Beast and co-founder of Spiral Camp, he teaches integrated movement to dancers, athletes and people of all kinds.

facilitators.name: Maja Ejrnæs
facilitators.bio_short: Dancer drawn to improvisation over fixed choreography. Her classes work with principles and scores — touch, weight-sharing, friction, gravity and momentum — guided by trust and curiosity.
